description_long: This induction cooker is integrated into a rectangular slab of speckled gray granite, giving it a modern and robust appearance. The cooktop features five distinct induction heating zones, each marked by circular outlines and protected by a black metal grate. The central burner is slightly larger and is surrounded by a metallic accent, likely for high-heat cooking. The control panel appears to be located along the front edge, with several knobs and possibly touch-sensitive areas for precise adjustments. The surface is predominantly smooth and glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the premium finish. No digital display or brand logo is visible, and the power cord is not apparent in any view.
description: A sleek induction cooker set into a speckled gray granite countertop, featuring five burners with black metal grates and a central metallic accent. The surface is smooth, glossy, and modern, with visible control knobs along the front edge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the granite countertop and the induction cooktop with all five burners and the control panel clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth of the granite slab and the arrangement of the burners from front to back.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the cooktop and burners but with the control panel less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the length of the countertop and the alignment of the burners from back to front.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located along the front edge of the cooktop, featuring several rotary knobs evenly spaced for each burner. No touch areas, labels, icons, or indicator lights are clearly visible.
